_comment: Multi-lab mutation audit baseline. scripts/audit_multilab_mutations.py fails CI if the current count exceeds the per-page baseline below. As of 2026-06-08 the baseline is empty: every known instance has been fixed or the path has been exempted with a documented architectural reason in EXEMPT_PREFIXES.
_canonical_fix: PR #606 (VeritaTrack Add Task) — pass trackApi/tasksKey/dashKey props from the page-level scope into mutation components; POST to ${trackApi}/<endpoint>; invalidateQueries({queryKey: [tasksKey/dashKey]}).

_history.2026-06-07_cleared_a: AccountSettingsPage.tsx + VeritaCheckPage.tsx + VeritaCheckVerificationPage.tsx all cleared via EXEMPT_PREFIXES additions and the verification page bugfix.
_history.2026-06-08_cleared_b: VeritaCompAppPage.tsx CLEARED. 11 queryKey/fetch sites swapped to lab-scoped form (programs, programs/${id}, employees). 5 remaining /api/veritacomp/programs/${id}/quizzes and /api/veritacomp/quizzes/${id}/withAnswers sites exempted because useQuery and invalidateQueries use the SAME unscoped key (internally consistent, no cache miss). The quizzes endpoint is account-scoped by design; a future architectural change could promote it to per-lab, at which point the exemption goes away.
